explanation: Reordering: The command uses the same executable and argument but reorders the components to avoid triggering the 'cmdkey' string match in the CommandLine field.
Omission: The command omits the executable path (assuming it's in the system PATH), which may avoid triggering the 'cmdkey.exe' string match in the CommandLine field.
Insertion: Adds an additional harmless flag '/v' which may not be part of the Sigma rule's detection logic, potentially avoiding the ' -l' string match.
